name: ReFa Heart Comb Aira
pros: Lightweight, portable design perfect for travel and daily carry in Japan's compact spaces
Extremely high review count (2,716 reviews) reflects genuine popularity among Japanese users
Attractive aesthetic—cute enough to be a legitimate gift, not just a functional tool
cons: Limited to bangs/front hair only—not a full-head styling solution
Premium pricing for a basic comb; functionality doesn't justify ¥2,970 versus generic ¥500 combs
shortDescription: ReFa's cute, portable bangs comb—Instagram-friendly but functionally basic.
review: The ReFa Heart Comb Aira is a perfectly adequate travel comb with excellent aesthetics and logistics. At ¥2,970, you're paying significantly for the ReFa brand name and cute design rather than revolutionary hair tech. It's easy for foreigners to find (Donki, Amazon Japan, Rakuten) and small enough to toss in any bag. If you need a dedicated bangs comb and want something Instagram-worthy, it delivers; otherwise, save your money.
